Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"},{"key":"Accept","value":"application/json, text/plain, */*"},{"key":"Content-Type","value":"application/json"},{"key":"x-api-key","value":"857a1e5d-e35e-4fdf-805b-a87b6f8364bf"},{"key":"Origin","value":"https://watch.shout-tv.com"},{"key":"Referer","value":"https://watch.shout-tv.com/"}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":true,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":"var KETSU_BASE_URL = \"https://watch.shout-tv.com\";\nvar USER_AGENT = \"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36\";\n\nfunction KeyValue(key, value) { this.key = key; this.value = value; }\nfunction ModuleRequest(url, method, headers, httpBody) { this.url = url; this.method = method; this.headers = headers; this.httpBody = httpBody; }\nfunction Extra(commands, extraInfo) { this.commands = commands; this.extraInfo = extraInfo; }\nfunction Commands(commandName, params) { this.commandName = commandName; this.params = params; }\nfunction JavascriptConfig(removeJavascript, loadInWebView, javaScript) { this.removeJavascript = removeJavascript; this.loadInWebView = loadInWebView; this.javaScript = javaScript; }\nfunction MainPage(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Search(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Info(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Chapters(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction PageOutput(cellDesing, orientation, defaultLayout, paging, section, layout, data) { this.cellDesing = cellDesing; this.orientation = orientation; this.defaultLayout = defaultLayout; this.paging = paging; this.section = section; this.layout = layout; this.data = data; }\nfunction Section(sectionName, separator) { this.sectionName = sectionName; this.separator = separator; }\nfunction Layout(insets, visibleCellsWidthS, visibleCellsWidthM, visibleCellsWidthL, visibleCellsHeight, heightForVisibleCells, cellSize, ratio, constant, horizontalSpacing, verticalSpacing) { this.insets = insets; this.visibleCellsWidthS = visibleCellsWidthS; this.visibleCellsWidthM = visibleCellsWidthM; this.visibleCellsWidthL = visibleCellsWidthL; this.visibleCellsHeight = visibleCellsHeight; this.heightForVisibleCells = heightForVisibleCells; this.cellSize = cellSize; this.ratio = ratio; this.constant = constant; this.horizontalSpacing = horizontalSpacing; this.verticalSpacing = verticalSpacing; }\nfunction Insets(top, bottom, left, right) { this.top = top; this.bottom = bottom; this.left = left; this.right = right; }\nfunction Size(width, height) { this.width = width; this.height = height; }\nfunction Ratio(inRelation, number1, number2) { this.inRelation = inRelation; this.number1 = number1; this.number2 = number2; }\nfunction Data(image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4, isChapter, link, openInWebView) { this.image = image; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.isChapter = isChapter; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction InfoOutput(image, link, title, description, genres, field1, field2, field3, field4, chapters) { this.image = image; this.link = link; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.genres = genres; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.chapters = chapters; }\nfunction Chapter(chapName, link, openInWebView) { this.chapName = chapName; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction ChapterOutput(videos, images, text) { this.videos = videos; this.images = images; this.text = text; }\nfunction Videos(needsResolver, rawVideo) { this.needsResolver = needsResolver; this.rawVideo = rawVideo; }\nfunction NeedsResolver(resolverIdentifier, link) { this.resolverIdentifier = resolverIdentifier; this.link = link; }\nfunction RawVideo(video) { this.video = video; }\nfunction Video(videoQuality, videoLink) { this.videoQuality = videoQuality; this.videoLink = videoLink; }\nfunction Text(text) { this.text = text; }\n\nfunction headers(extra) {\n  var list = [new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT)];\n  if (KETSU_BASE_URL) list.push(new KeyValue(\"Referer\", KETSU_BASE_URL));\n  if (extra) for (var i = 0; i < extra.length; i++) list.push(extra[i]);\n  return list;\n}\nfunction request(url, method, headerList, body) { return new ModuleRequest(url || \"\", method || \"get\", headerList || headers(), body || null); }\nfunction emptyExtra(extraInfo) { return new Extra([new Commands(\"\", [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")])], extraInfo || [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")]); }\nfunction noJs() { return new JavascriptConfig(false, false, \"\"); }\nfunction defaultLayout() { return new Layout(new Insets(8, 8, 8, 8), 2, 2, 3, 1, 540, new Size(300, 540), new Ratio(\"width\", 2, 3), new Size(1, 2), 10, 12); }\nfunction getSaved() {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  try { return JSON.parse(savedData.innerHTML || savedData.innerText || \"{}\"); } catch (e) { return {}; }\n}\nfunction safeJson(value) {\n  return JSON.stringify(value).replace(/&/g, \"\\\\u0026\").replace(/</g, \"\\\\u003c\").replace(/>/g, \"\\\\u003e\");\n}\nfunction finish(obj) {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  savedData.innerHTML = safeJson(obj);\n}\nfunction currentUrl() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  if (state && state.request && state.request.url) return state.request.url;\n  try { return window.location.href; } catch (e) { return KETSU_BASE_URL; }\n}\nfunction readPayload() {\n  var script = document.querySelector(\"script\");\n  var txt = \"\";\n  if (script && script.textContent) {\n    var candidate = script.textContent.trim();\n    if (candidate.indexOf(\"{\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"[\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = candidate;\n  }\n  if (!txt && document.body) txt = (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\").trim();\n  if (txt.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = txt.slice(2);\n  if (txt.lastIndexOf(\"*/\") === txt.length - 2) txt = txt.slice(0, -2);\n  return txt.trim();\n}\nfunction parseJsonPayload() { return JSON.parse(readPayload()); }\nfunction docFromHtml(html) { return new DOMParser().parseFromString(html || \"\", \"text/html\"); }\nfunction attr(el, name) { return el ? (el.getAttribute(name) || \"\") : \"\"; }\nfunction text(el) { return cleanText(el ? (el.innerText || el.textContent || \"\") : \"\"); }\nfunction cleanText(value) {\n  return String(value || \"\")\n    .replace(/\\r/g, \"\")\n    .replace(/\\u00a0/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]+\\n/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/\\n[ \\t]+/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]{2,}/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/\\n{3,}/g, \"\\n\\n\")\n    .trim();\n}\nfunction htmlDecode(value) {\n  var ta = document.createElement(\"textarea\");\n  ta.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return ta.value;\n}\nfunction stripTags(value) {\n  var div = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  div.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return cleanText(div.textContent || div.innerText || \"\");\n}\nfunction absUrl(url, base) {\n  if (!url) return \"\";\n  try { return new URL(htmlDecode(url), base || currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL).href; }\n  catch (e) {\n    if (String(url).indexOf(\"//\") === 0) return \"https:\" + url;\n    if (String(url).charAt(0) === \"/\") return (base || KETSU_BASE_URL).replace(/\\/$/, \"\") + url;\n    return url;\n  }\n}\nfunction meta(name, doc) {\n  doc = doc || document;\n  var el = doc.querySelector('meta[property=\"' + name + '\"], meta[name=\"' + name + '\"]');\n  return attr(el, \"content\");\n}\nfunction uniquePush(list, seen, key, value) {\n  if (!key || seen[key]) return;\n  seen[key] = true;\n  list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"distro.tv\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"jsrdn.com\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"shout-tv.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"imggaming.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"dicelaboratory.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"xumo.com\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"xumo.\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"iptv-org.github.io\", \"IPTV-org\"],\n    [\"filmzie.com\", \"Filmzie\"],\n    [\"tubitv.com\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"tubi.io\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\nfunction isVerificationPage() {\n  var title = cleanText(document.title || \"\");\n  var body = cleanText(document.body ? (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\") : \"\");\n  return /just a moment|security verification|protect against malicious bots|cloudflare|ray id:/i.test(title + \"\\n\" + body);\n}\nfunction verificationDescription(site) {\n  return site + \" returned a browser/security verification page instead of readable content. Open the source in a browser, clear the check if it appears, then retry the module.\";\n}\nfunction emitVerificationPage(kind, site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var data = [new Data(request(\"\"), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page\", false, request(link), true)];\n  emitPage(kind, data, site);\n}\nfunction emitVerificationInfo(site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var chapter = new Chapter(\"Source blocked by browser verification\", request(link), true);\n  emitInfo(new InfoOutput(request(\"\"), request(link), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), [\"Source verification\"], \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page or retry later\", [chapter]), \"\");\n}\nfunction emitVerificationChapter(site) {\n  emitTextChapter(verificationDescription(site));\n}\n\nvar SHOUT_INIT_URL = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v1/init/?lk=language&pk=subTitleLanguage&pk=subtitlePreferenceMode&pk=subtitlePreferenceMap&pk=audioLanguage&pk=autoAdvance&pk=pluginAccessTokens&pk=videoBackgroundAutoPlay&readLicences=true&countEvents=LIVE&menuTargetPlatform=WEB&readIconStore=ENABLED&readUserProfiles=true\";\nvar SHOUT_HOME_URL = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v4/content/home?bpp=10&rpp=12&displaySectionLinkBuckets=SHOW&displayEpgBuckets=HIDE&displayEmptyBucketShortcuts=SHOW&displayContentAvailableOnSignIn=SHOW&displayGeoblocked=HIDE&bspp=20&premiereEventContentDisplay=SHOW&displayHeroLicences=SHOW\";\nvar SHOUT_LIVE_URL = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v2/event/live?p=1&rpp=25\";\nvar SHOUT_API_KEY = \"857a1e5d-e35e-4fdf-805b-a87b6f8364bf\";\nfunction shoutWithParam(url, key, value) {\n  if (!value) return url;\n  return url + (url.indexOf(\"?\") >= 0 ? \"&\" : \"?\") + encodeURIComponent(key) + \"=\" + encodeURIComponent(value);\n}\nfunction shoutHeaders(token) {\n  var list = [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"x-api-key\", SHOUT_API_KEY),\n    new KeyValue(\"Origin\", \"https://watch.shout-tv.com\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://watch.shout-tv.com/\")\n  ];\n  if (token) {\n    list.push(new KeyValue(\"Authorization\", \"Bearer \" + token));\n    list.push(new KeyValue(\"Realm\", \"dce.shout\"));\n  }\n  return list;\n}\nfunction shoutToken(json) {\n  return json && json.authentication ? (json.authentication.authorisationToken || json.authentication.authorizationToken || \"\") : \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutTokenFromState() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var hs = state && state.request && state.request.headers ? state.request.headers : [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < hs.length; i++) {\n    if (/^authorization$/i.test(hs[i].key || \"\")) return String(hs[i].value || \"\").replace(/^Bearer\\s+/i, \"\");\n  }\n  return \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutQuery() {\n  try { return cleanText(new URL(currentUrl()).searchParams.get(\"zetsu_search\") || \"\").toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { return \"\"; }\n}\nfunction shoutManifestBody() {\n  return JSON.stringify({\n    mediaCapabilities: [{ protocols: [\"HLS\", \"DASH\"], audioCodecs: [\"aac\"], videoCodecs: [\"h264\"] }],\n    macros: {\n      \"CM-APP-NAME\": \"Website\",\n      \"CM-APP-VERSION\": \"6.60.0.f412a98\",\n      \"CM-DVC-DNT\": \"0\",\n      \"CM-DVC-H\": \"720\",\n      \"CM-DVC-W\": \"1280\",\n      \"CM-DVC-LANG\": \"en-US\",\n      \"CM-DVC-OS\": \"28\",\n      \"CM-DVC-TYPE\": \"2\",\n      \"CM-WEB-MBL\": \"0\",\n      \"CM-WEB-PAGE\": \"https://watch.shout-tv.com/\"\n    }\n  });\n}\nfunction shoutDetailRequest(event, token) {\n  var id = encodeURIComponent(event.id || \"\");\n  if (event.type === \"LIVE\") {\n    return request(\"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v4/event/\" + id + \"?includePlaybackDetails=URL&displayGeoblocked=HIDE\", \"get\", shoutHeaders(token), null);\n  }\n  return request(\"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v5/manifest/video/\" + id + \"?includePlaybackDetails=URL&displayGeoblocked=HIDE\", \"post\", shoutHeaders(token), shoutManifestBody());\n}\nfunction shoutInfoInitRequest(event) {\n  var url = shoutWithParam(SHOUT_INIT_URL, \"zetsu_id\", event.id || \"\");\n  url = shoutWithParam(url, \"zetsu_type\", event.type || \"VOD\");\n  return request(url, \"get\", shoutHeaders(\"\"), null);\n}\nfunction shoutEventImage(event) {\n  var info = event.programmingInfo || {};\n  var current = info.currentProgramme || {};\n  return event.posterUrl || event.coverUrl || event.thumbnailUrl || current.thumbnailUrl || info.channelLogoUrl || \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutEventDescription(event) {\n  var info = event.programmingInfo || {};\n  var current = info.currentProgramme || {};\n  if (event.type === \"LIVE\" && current.programme) {\n    var bits = [current.programme, current.episode, current.description].filter(Boolean);\n    return cleanText(bits.join(\" - \"));\n  }\n  return cleanText(event.description || event.longDescription || \"\");\n}\nfunction shoutDuration(seconds) {\n  seconds = parseInt(seconds || 0, 10);\n  if (!seconds) return \"\";\n  var minutes = Math.round(seconds / 60);\n  var h = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\n  var m = minutes % 60;\n  return h ? (h + \"h \" + (m ? m + \"m\" : \"\")) : (m + \"m\");\n}\nfunction shoutPlayable(event) {\n  if (!event || !event.id || !event.title) return false;\n  if (event.accessLevel !== \"GRANTED\") return false;\n  return event.type === \"VOD\" || event.type === \"LIVE\";\n}\nfunction shoutMatches(event, query) {\n  if (!query) return true;\n  var info = event.programmingInfo || {};\n  var current = info.currentProgramme || {};\n  var textBlob = [event.title, event.description, event.longDescription, event.type, current.programme, current.episode, current.description].join(\" \").toLowerCase();\n  return textBlob.indexOf(query) >= 0;\n}\nfunction shoutCollectEvents(json) {\n  var out = [];\n  var seen = {};\n  function add(event) {\n    if (!shoutPlayable(event)) return;\n    var key = event.type + \":\" + event.id;\n    if (seen[key]) return;\n    seen[key] = true;\n    out.push(event);\n  }\n  function walk(node) {\n    if (!node || out.length > 400) return;\n    if (Array.isArray(node)) {\n      for (var i = 0; i < node.length; i++) walk(node[i]);\n      return;\n    }\n    if (typeof node !== \"object\") return;\n    if (node.event) add(node.event);\n    add(node);\n    for (var key in node) if (node.hasOwnProperty(key)) walk(node[key]);\n  }\n  if (json && Array.isArray(json.events)) {\n    for (var e = 0; e < json.events.length; e++) add(json.events[e]);\n  } else {\n    walk(json);\n  }\n  return out;\n}\nfunction shoutData(event) {\n  var title = cleanText(event.title || \"Shout TV\");\n  var desc = shoutEventDescription(event);\n  var typeLabel = event.type === \"LIVE\" ? \"Live\" : shoutDuration(event.duration || 0);\n  return new Data(request(shoutEventImage(event)), title, desc, \"Shout TV\", \"\", \"\", \"\", false, shoutInfoInitRequest(event), false);\n}\nfunction shoutGenres(item) {\n  var genres = [];\n  if (item.type === \"LIVE\") genres.push(\"Live TV\");\n  if (item.type === \"VOD\") genres.push(\"Movie / VOD\");\n  var current = item.programmingInfo && item.programmingInfo.currentProgramme ? item.programmingInfo.currentProgramme : {};\n  if (current.genre) genres.push(current.genre);\n  var cats = item.categories || [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < cats.length && genres.length < 6; i++) if (cats[i]) genres.push(String(cats[i]));\n  var tags = item.displayableTags || item.typedTags || [];\n  for (var t = 0; t < tags.length && genres.length < 6; t++) {\n    var tag = tags[t] && (tags[t].title || tags[t].name || tags[t].value || tags[t]);\n    if (tag) genres.push(String(tag));\n  }\n  return genres.length ? genres : [\"Shout TV\"];\n}\nfunction shoutVodStream(item) {\n  var streams = item.streams || [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < streams.length; i++) {\n    var s = streams[i] || {};\n    if (/HLS/i.test(s.protocol || \"\") && s.url) return s.url;\n  }\n  for (var j = 0; j < streams.length; j++) if (streams[j] && streams[j].url && /\\.m3u8/i.test(streams[j].url)) return streams[j].url;\n  return \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutPlaybackUrl(item) {\n  if (!item) return \"\";\n  return item.hlsUrl || (item.hls && item.hls.url) || shoutVodStream(item) || \"\";\n}\n\nvar json = parseJsonPayload();\nvar token = shoutToken(json);\nvar query = shoutQuery();\nvar next = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v4/content/home?bpp=10&rpp=12&displaySectionLinkBuckets=SHOW&displayEpgBuckets=HIDE&displayEmptyBucketShortcuts=SHOW&displayContentAvailableOnSignIn=SHOW&displayGeoblocked=HIDE&bspp=20&premiereEventContentDisplay=SHOW&displayHeroLicences=SHOW\";\nif (query) next = shoutWithParam(next, \"zetsu_search\", query);\nvar state = getSaved();\nvar ctor = \"main\" === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\nfinish(new ctor(request(next, \"get\", shoutHeaders(token), null), emptyExtra(), noJs(), state.output || []));\n"},"output":[{"cellDesing":"wide6","orientation":"vertical","defaultLayout":"longDoubletsFull","paging":"leading","section":{"sectionName":"","separator":false},"layout":{"insets":{"top":8,"bottom":8,"left":8,"right":8},"visibleCellsWidthS":2,"visibleCellsWidthM":2,"visibleCellsWidthL":3,"visibleCellsHeight":1,"heightForVisibleCells":540,"cellSize":{"width":300,"height":540},"ratio":{"inRelation":"width","number1":2,"number2":3},"constant":{"width":1,"height":2},"horizontalSpacing":10,"verticalSpacing":12},"data":[{"image":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"title":"","description":"","field1":"","field2":"","field3":"","field4":"","openInWebView":false,"isChapter":false,"link":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}]}],"separator":""},{"request":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"User-Agent","value":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":true,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":"var KETSU_BASE_URL = \"https://watch.shout-tv.com\";\nvar USER_AGENT = \"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36\";\n\nfunction KeyValue(key, value) { this.key = key; this.value = value; }\nfunction ModuleRequest(url, method, headers, httpBody) { this.url = url; this.method = method; this.headers = headers; this.httpBody = httpBody; }\nfunction Extra(commands, extraInfo) { this.commands = commands; this.extraInfo = extraInfo; }\nfunction Commands(commandName, params) { this.commandName = commandName; this.params = params; }\nfunction JavascriptConfig(removeJavascript, loadInWebView, javaScript) { this.removeJavascript = removeJavascript; this.loadInWebView = loadInWebView; this.javaScript = javaScript; }\nfunction MainPage(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Search(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Info(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Chapters(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction PageOutput(cellDesing, orientation, defaultLayout, paging, section, layout, data) { this.cellDesing = cellDesing; this.orientation = orientation; this.defaultLayout = defaultLayout; this.paging = paging; this.section = section; this.layout = layout; this.data = data; }\nfunction Section(sectionName, separator) { this.sectionName = sectionName; this.separator = separator; }\nfunction Layout(insets, visibleCellsWidthS, visibleCellsWidthM, visibleCellsWidthL, visibleCellsHeight, heightForVisibleCells, cellSize, ratio, constant, horizontalSpacing, verticalSpacing) { this.insets = insets; this.visibleCellsWidthS = visibleCellsWidthS; this.visibleCellsWidthM = visibleCellsWidthM; this.visibleCellsWidthL = visibleCellsWidthL; this.visibleCellsHeight = visibleCellsHeight; this.heightForVisibleCells = heightForVisibleCells; this.cellSize = cellSize; this.ratio = ratio; this.constant = constant; this.horizontalSpacing = horizontalSpacing; this.verticalSpacing = verticalSpacing; }\nfunction Insets(top, bottom, left, right) { this.top = top; this.bottom = bottom; this.left = left; this.right = right; }\nfunction Size(width, height) { this.width = width; this.height = height; }\nfunction Ratio(inRelation, number1, number2) { this.inRelation = inRelation; this.number1 = number1; this.number2 = number2; }\nfunction Data(image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4, isChapter, link, openInWebView) { this.image = image; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.isChapter = isChapter; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction InfoOutput(image, link, title, description, genres, field1, field2, field3, field4, chapters) { this.image = image; this.link = link; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.genres = genres; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.chapters = chapters; }\nfunction Chapter(chapName, link, openInWebView) { this.chapName = chapName; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction ChapterOutput(videos, images, text) { this.videos = videos; this.images = images; this.text = text; }\nfunction Videos(needsResolver, rawVideo) { this.needsResolver = needsResolver; this.rawVideo = rawVideo; }\nfunction NeedsResolver(resolverIdentifier, link) { this.resolverIdentifier = resolverIdentifier; this.link = link; }\nfunction RawVideo(video) { this.video = video; }\nfunction Video(videoQuality, videoLink) { this.videoQuality = videoQuality; this.videoLink = videoLink; }\nfunction Text(text) { this.text = text; }\n\nfunction headers(extra) {\n  var list = [new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT)];\n  if (KETSU_BASE_URL) list.push(new KeyValue(\"Referer\", KETSU_BASE_URL));\n  if (extra) for (var i = 0; i < extra.length; i++) list.push(extra[i]);\n  return list;\n}\nfunction request(url, method, headerList, body) { return new ModuleRequest(url || \"\", method || \"get\", headerList || headers(), body || null); }\nfunction emptyExtra(extraInfo) { return new Extra([new Commands(\"\", [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")])], extraInfo || [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")]); }\nfunction noJs() { return new JavascriptConfig(false, false, \"\"); }\nfunction defaultLayout() { return new Layout(new Insets(8, 8, 8, 8), 2, 2, 3, 1, 540, new Size(300, 540), new Ratio(\"width\", 2, 3), new Size(1, 2), 10, 12); }\nfunction getSaved() {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  try { return JSON.parse(savedData.innerHTML || savedData.innerText || \"{}\"); } catch (e) { return {}; }\n}\nfunction safeJson(value) {\n  return JSON.stringify(value).replace(/&/g, \"\\\\u0026\").replace(/</g, \"\\\\u003c\").replace(/>/g, \"\\\\u003e\");\n}\nfunction finish(obj) {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  savedData.innerHTML = safeJson(obj);\n}\nfunction currentUrl() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  if (state && state.request && state.request.url) return state.request.url;\n  try { return window.location.href; } catch (e) { return KETSU_BASE_URL; }\n}\nfunction readPayload() {\n  var script = document.querySelector(\"script\");\n  var txt = \"\";\n  if (script && script.textContent) {\n    var candidate = script.textContent.trim();\n    if (candidate.indexOf(\"{\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"[\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = candidate;\n  }\n  if (!txt && document.body) txt = (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\").trim();\n  if (txt.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = txt.slice(2);\n  if (txt.lastIndexOf(\"*/\") === txt.length - 2) txt = txt.slice(0, -2);\n  return txt.trim();\n}\nfunction parseJsonPayload() { return JSON.parse(readPayload()); }\nfunction docFromHtml(html) { return new DOMParser().parseFromString(html || \"\", \"text/html\"); }\nfunction attr(el, name) { return el ? (el.getAttribute(name) || \"\") : \"\"; }\nfunction text(el) { return cleanText(el ? (el.innerText || el.textContent || \"\") : \"\"); }\nfunction cleanText(value) {\n  return String(value || \"\")\n    .replace(/\\r/g, \"\")\n    .replace(/\\u00a0/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]+\\n/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/\\n[ \\t]+/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]{2,}/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/\\n{3,}/g, \"\\n\\n\")\n    .trim();\n}\nfunction htmlDecode(value) {\n  var ta = document.createElement(\"textarea\");\n  ta.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return ta.value;\n}\nfunction stripTags(value) {\n  var div = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  div.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return cleanText(div.textContent || div.innerText || \"\");\n}\nfunction absUrl(url, base) {\n  if (!url) return \"\";\n  try { return new URL(htmlDecode(url), base || currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL).href; }\n  catch (e) {\n    if (String(url).indexOf(\"//\") === 0) return \"https:\" + url;\n    if (String(url).charAt(0) === \"/\") return (base || KETSU_BASE_URL).replace(/\\/$/, \"\") + url;\n    return url;\n  }\n}\nfunction meta(name, doc) {\n  doc = doc || document;\n  var el = doc.querySelector('meta[property=\"' + name + '\"], meta[name=\"' + name + '\"]');\n  return attr(el, \"content\");\n}\nfunction uniquePush(list, seen, key, value) {\n  if (!key || seen[key]) return;\n  seen[key] = true;\n  list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"distro.tv\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"jsrdn.com\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"shout-tv.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"imggaming.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"dicelaboratory.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"xumo.com\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"xumo.\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"iptv-org.github.io\", \"IPTV-org\"],\n    [\"filmzie.com\", \"Filmzie\"],\n    [\"tubitv.com\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"tubi.io\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\nfunction isVerificationPage() {\n  var title = cleanText(document.title || \"\");\n  var body = cleanText(document.body ? (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\") : \"\");\n  return /just a moment|security verification|protect against malicious bots|cloudflare|ray id:/i.test(title + \"\\n\" + body);\n}\nfunction verificationDescription(site) {\n  return site + \" returned a browser/security verification page instead of readable content. Open the source in a browser, clear the check if it appears, then retry the module.\";\n}\nfunction emitVerificationPage(kind, site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var data = [new Data(request(\"\"), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page\", false, request(link), true)];\n  emitPage(kind, data, site);\n}\nfunction emitVerificationInfo(site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var chapter = new Chapter(\"Source blocked by browser verification\", request(link), true);\n  emitInfo(new InfoOutput(request(\"\"), request(link), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), [\"Source verification\"], \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page or retry later\", [chapter]), \"\");\n}\nfunction emitVerificationChapter(site) {\n  emitTextChapter(verificationDescription(site));\n}\n\nvar SHOUT_INIT_URL = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v1/init/?lk=language&pk=subTitleLanguage&pk=subtitlePreferenceMode&pk=subtitlePreferenceMap&pk=audioLanguage&pk=autoAdvance&pk=pluginAccessTokens&pk=videoBackgroundAutoPlay&readLicences=true&countEvents=LIVE&menuTargetPlatform=WEB&readIconStore=ENABLED&readUserProfiles=true\";\nvar SHOUT_HOME_URL = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v4/content/home?bpp=10&rpp=12&displaySectionLinkBuckets=SHOW&displayEpgBuckets=HIDE&displayEmptyBucketShortcuts=SHOW&displayContentAvailableOnSignIn=SHOW&displayGeoblocked=HIDE&bspp=20&premiereEventContentDisplay=SHOW&displayHeroLicences=SHOW\";\nvar SHOUT_LIVE_URL = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v2/event/live?p=1&rpp=25\";\nvar SHOUT_API_KEY = \"857a1e5d-e35e-4fdf-805b-a87b6f8364bf\";\nfunction shoutWithParam(url, key, value) {\n  if (!value) return url;\n  return url + (url.indexOf(\"?\") >= 0 ? \"&\" : \"?\") + encodeURIComponent(key) + \"=\" + encodeURIComponent(value);\n}\nfunction shoutHeaders(token) {\n  var list = [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"x-api-key\", SHOUT_API_KEY),\n    new KeyValue(\"Origin\", \"https://watch.shout-tv.com\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://watch.shout-tv.com/\")\n  ];\n  if (token) {\n    list.push(new KeyValue(\"Authorization\", \"Bearer \" + token));\n    list.push(new KeyValue(\"Realm\", \"dce.shout\"));\n  }\n  return list;\n}\nfunction shoutToken(json) {\n  return json && json.authentication ? (json.authentication.authorisationToken || json.authentication.authorizationToken || \"\") : \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutTokenFromState() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var hs = state && state.request && state.request.headers ? state.request.headers : [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < hs.length; i++) {\n    if (/^authorization$/i.test(hs[i].key || \"\")) return String(hs[i].value || \"\").replace(/^Bearer\\s+/i, \"\");\n  }\n  return \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutQuery() {\n  try { return cleanText(new URL(currentUrl()).searchParams.get(\"zetsu_search\") || \"\").toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { return \"\"; }\n}\nfunction shoutManifestBody() {\n  return JSON.stringify({\n    mediaCapabilities: [{ protocols: [\"HLS\", \"DASH\"], audioCodecs: [\"aac\"], videoCodecs: [\"h264\"] }],\n    macros: {\n      \"CM-APP-NAME\": \"Website\",\n      \"CM-APP-VERSION\": \"6.60.0.f412a98\",\n      \"CM-DVC-DNT\": \"0\",\n      \"CM-DVC-H\": \"720\",\n      \"CM-DVC-W\": \"1280\",\n      \"CM-DVC-LANG\": \"en-US\",\n      \"CM-DVC-OS\": \"28\",\n      \"CM-DVC-TYPE\": \"2\",\n      \"CM-WEB-MBL\": \"0\",\n      \"CM-WEB-PAGE\": \"https://watch.shout-tv.com/\"\n    }\n  });\n}\nfunction shoutDetailRequest(event, token) {\n  var id = encodeURIComponent(event.id || \"\");\n  if (event.type === \"LIVE\") {\n    return request(\"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v4/event/\" + id + \"?includePlaybackDetails=URL&displayGeoblocked=HIDE\", \"get\", shoutHeaders(token), null);\n  }\n  return request(\"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v5/manifest/video/\" + id + \"?includePlaybackDetails=URL&displayGeoblocked=HIDE\", \"post\", shoutHeaders(token), shoutManifestBody());\n}\nfunction shoutInfoInitRequest(event) {\n  var url = shoutWithParam(SHOUT_INIT_URL, \"zetsu_id\", event.id || \"\");\n  url = shoutWithParam(url, \"zetsu_type\", event.type || \"VOD\");\n  return request(url, \"get\", shoutHeaders(\"\"), null);\n}\nfunction shoutEventImage(event) {\n  var info = event.programmingInfo || {};\n  var current = info.currentProgramme || {};\n  return event.posterUrl || event.coverUrl || event.thumbnailUrl || current.thumbnailUrl || info.channelLogoUrl || \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutEventDescription(event) {\n  var info = event.programmingInfo || {};\n  var current = info.currentProgramme || {};\n  if (event.type === \"LIVE\" && current.programme) {\n    var bits = [current.programme, current.episode, current.description].filter(Boolean);\n    return cleanText(bits.join(\" - \"));\n  }\n  return cleanText(event.description || event.longDescription || \"\");\n}\nfunction shoutDuration(seconds) {\n  seconds = parseInt(seconds || 0, 10);\n  if (!seconds) return \"\";\n  var minutes = Math.round(seconds / 60);\n  var h = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\n  var m = minutes % 60;\n  return h ? (h + \"h \" + (m ? m + \"m\" : \"\")) : (m + \"m\");\n}\nfunction shoutPlayable(event) {\n  if (!event || !event.id || !event.title) return false;\n  if (event.accessLevel !== \"GRANTED\") return false;\n  return event.type === \"VOD\" || event.type === \"LIVE\";\n}\nfunction shoutMatches(event, query) {\n  if (!query) return true;\n  var info = event.programmingInfo || {};\n  var current = info.currentProgramme || {};\n  var textBlob = [event.title, event.description, event.longDescription, event.type, current.programme, current.episode, current.description].join(\" \").toLowerCase();\n  return textBlob.indexOf(query) >= 0;\n}\nfunction shoutCollectEvents(json) {\n  var out = [];\n  var seen = {};\n  function add(event) {\n    if (!shoutPlayable(event)) return;\n    var key = event.type + \":\" + event.id;\n    if (seen[key]) return;\n    seen[key] = true;\n    out.push(event);\n  }\n  function walk(node) {\n    if (!node || out.length > 400) return;\n    if (Array.isArray(node)) {\n      for (var i = 0; i < node.length; i++) walk(node[i]);\n      return;\n    }\n    if (typeof node !== \"object\") return;\n    if (node.event) add(node.event);\n    add(node);\n    for (var key in node) if (node.hasOwnProperty(key)) walk(node[key]);\n  }\n  if (json && Array.isArray(json.events)) {\n    for (var e = 0; e < json.events.length; e++) add(json.events[e]);\n  } else {\n    walk(json);\n  }\n  return out;\n}\nfunction shoutData(event) {\n  var title = cleanText(event.title || \"Shout TV\");\n  var desc = shoutEventDescription(event);\n  var typeLabel = event.type === \"LIVE\" ? \"Live\" : shoutDuration(event.duration || 0);\n  return new Data(request(shoutEventImage(event)), title, desc, \"Shout TV\", \"\", \"\", \"\", false, shoutInfoInitRequest(event), false);\n}\nfunction shoutGenres(item) {\n  var genres = [];\n  if (item.type === \"LIVE\") genres.push(\"Live TV\");\n  if (item.type === \"VOD\") genres.push(\"Movie / VOD\");\n  var current = item.programmingInfo && item.programmingInfo.currentProgramme ? item.programmingInfo.currentProgramme : {};\n  if (current.genre) genres.push(current.genre);\n  var cats = item.categories || [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < cats.length && genres.length < 6; i++) if (cats[i]) genres.push(String(cats[i]));\n  var tags = item.displayableTags || item.typedTags || [];\n  for (var t = 0; t < tags.length && genres.length < 6; t++) {\n    var tag = tags[t] && (tags[t].title || tags[t].name || tags[t].value || tags[t]);\n    if (tag) genres.push(String(tag));\n  }\n  return genres.length ? genres : [\"Shout TV\"];\n}\nfunction shoutVodStream(item) {\n  var streams = item.streams || [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < streams.length; i++) {\n    var s = streams[i] || {};\n    if (/HLS/i.test(s.protocol || \"\") && s.url) return s.url;\n  }\n  for (var j = 0; j < streams.length; j++) if (streams[j] && streams[j].url && /\\.m3u8/i.test(streams[j].url)) return streams[j].url;\n  return \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutPlaybackUrl(item) {\n  if (!item) return \"\";\n  return item.hlsUrl || (item.hls && item.hls.url) || shoutVodStream(item) || \"\";\n}\n\nvar json = parseJsonPayload();\nvar query = shoutQuery();\nvar token = shoutTokenFromState();\nvar rows = shoutCollectEvents(json);\nvar data = [];\nvar seen = {};\nfor (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {\n  var event = rows[i];\n  if (!shoutMatches(event, query)) continue;\n  uniquePush(data, seen, event.type + \":\" + event.id, shoutData(event));\n}\nvar state = getSaved();\nvar output = state.output || [];\nif (output.length === 1) {\n  var first = output[0] || {};\n  var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n  if (firstData && !firstData.title && !(firstData.link && firstData.link.url)) output = [];\n}\nif (data.length) output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(\"Shout TV Movies\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\nvar next = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v2/event/live?p=1&rpp=25\";\nif (next && query) next = shoutWithParam(next, \"zetsu_search\", query);\nvar ctor = \"main\" === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\nfinish(new ctor(request(next || \"\", \"get\", next ? shoutHeaders(token) : headers(), null), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n"},"output":[{"cellDesing":"wide6","orientation":"vertical","defaultLayout":"longDoubletsFull","paging":"leading","section":{"sectionName":"","separator":false},"layout":{"insets":{"top":8,"bottom":8,"left":8,"right":8},"visibleCellsWidthS":2,"visibleCellsWidthM":2,"visibleCellsWidthL":3,"visibleCellsHeight":1,"heightForVisibleCells":540,"cellSize":{"width":300,"height":540},"ratio":{"inRelation":"width","number1":2,"number2":3},"constant":{"width":1,"height":2},"horizontalSpacing":10,"verticalSpacing":12},"data":[{"image":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"title":"","description":"","field1":"","field2":"","field3":"","field4":"","openInWebView":false,"isChapter":false,"link":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}]}],"separator":""},{"request":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"User-Agent","value":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":true,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":"var KETSU_BASE_URL = \"https://watch.shout-tv.com\";\nvar USER_AGENT = \"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36\";\n\nfunction KeyValue(key, value) { this.key = key; this.value = value; }\nfunction ModuleRequest(url, method, headers, httpBody) { this.url = url; this.method = method; this.headers = headers; this.httpBody = httpBody; }\nfunction Extra(commands, extraInfo) { this.commands = commands; this.extraInfo = extraInfo; }\nfunction Commands(commandName, params) { this.commandName = commandName; this.params = params; }\nfunction JavascriptConfig(removeJavascript, loadInWebView, javaScript) { this.removeJavascript = removeJavascript; this.loadInWebView = loadInWebView; this.javaScript = javaScript; }\nfunction MainPage(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Search(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Info(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Chapters(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction PageOutput(cellDesing, orientation, defaultLayout, paging, section, layout, data) { this.cellDesing = cellDesing; this.orientation = orientation; this.defaultLayout = defaultLayout; this.paging = paging; this.section = section; this.layout = layout; this.data = data; }\nfunction Section(sectionName, separator) { this.sectionName = sectionName; this.separator = separator; }\nfunction Layout(insets, visibleCellsWidthS, visibleCellsWidthM, visibleCellsWidthL, visibleCellsHeight, heightForVisibleCells, cellSize, ratio, constant, horizontalSpacing, verticalSpacing) { this.insets = insets; this.visibleCellsWidthS = visibleCellsWidthS; this.visibleCellsWidthM = visibleCellsWidthM; this.visibleCellsWidthL = visibleCellsWidthL; this.visibleCellsHeight = visibleCellsHeight; this.heightForVisibleCells = heightForVisibleCells; this.cellSize = cellSize; this.ratio = ratio; this.constant = constant; this.horizontalSpacing = horizontalSpacing; this.verticalSpacing = verticalSpacing; }\nfunction Insets(top, bottom, left, right) { this.top = top; this.bottom = bottom; this.left = left; this.right = right; }\nfunction Size(width, height) { this.width = width; this.height = height; }\nfunction Ratio(inRelation, number1, number2) { this.inRelation = inRelation; this.number1 = number1; this.number2 = number2; }\nfunction Data(image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4, isChapter, link, openInWebView) { this.image = image; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.isChapter = isChapter; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction InfoOutput(image, link, title, description, genres, field1, field2, field3, field4, chapters) { this.image = image; this.link = link; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.genres = genres; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.chapters = chapters; }\nfunction Chapter(chapName, link, openInWebView) { this.chapName = chapName; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction ChapterOutput(videos, images, text) { this.videos = videos; this.images = images; this.text = text; }\nfunction Videos(needsResolver, rawVideo) { this.needsResolver = needsResolver; this.rawVideo = rawVideo; }\nfunction NeedsResolver(resolverIdentifier, link) { this.resolverIdentifier = resolverIdentifier; this.link = link; }\nfunction RawVideo(video) { this.video = video; }\nfunction Video(videoQuality, videoLink) { this.videoQuality = videoQuality; this.videoLink = videoLink; }\nfunction Text(text) { this.text = text; }\n\nfunction headers(extra) {\n  var list = [new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT)];\n  if (KETSU_BASE_URL) list.push(new KeyValue(\"Referer\", KETSU_BASE_URL));\n  if (extra) for (var i = 0; i < extra.length; i++) list.push(extra[i]);\n  return list;\n}\nfunction request(url, method, headerList, body) { return new ModuleRequest(url || \"\", method || \"get\", headerList || headers(), body || null); }\nfunction emptyExtra(extraInfo) { return new Extra([new Commands(\"\", [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")])], extraInfo || [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")]); }\nfunction noJs() { return new JavascriptConfig(false, false, \"\"); }\nfunction defaultLayout() { return new Layout(new Insets(8, 8, 8, 8), 2, 2, 3, 1, 540, new Size(300, 540), new Ratio(\"width\", 2, 3), new Size(1, 2), 10, 12); }\nfunction getSaved() {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  try { return JSON.parse(savedData.innerHTML || savedData.innerText || \"{}\"); } catch (e) { return {}; }\n}\nfunction safeJson(value) {\n  return JSON.stringify(value).replace(/&/g, \"\\\\u0026\").replace(/</g, \"\\\\u003c\").replace(/>/g, \"\\\\u003e\");\n}\nfunction finish(obj) {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  savedData.innerHTML = safeJson(obj);\n}\nfunction currentUrl() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  if (state && state.request && state.request.url) return state.request.url;\n  try { return window.location.href; } catch (e) { return KETSU_BASE_URL; }\n}\nfunction readPayload() {\n  var script = document.querySelector(\"script\");\n  var txt = \"\";\n  if (script && script.textContent) {\n    var candidate = script.textContent.trim();\n    if (candidate.indexOf(\"{\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"[\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = candidate;\n  }\n  if (!txt && document.body) txt = (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\").trim();\n  if (txt.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = txt.slice(2);\n  if (txt.lastIndexOf(\"*/\") === txt.length - 2) txt = txt.slice(0, -2);\n  return txt.trim();\n}\nfunction parseJsonPayload() { return JSON.parse(readPayload()); }\nfunction docFromHtml(html) { return new DOMParser().parseFromString(html || \"\", \"text/html\"); }\nfunction attr(el, name) { return el ? (el.getAttribute(name) || \"\") : \"\"; }\nfunction text(el) { return cleanText(el ? (el.innerText || el.textContent || \"\") : \"\"); }\nfunction cleanText(value) {\n  return String(value || \"\")\n    .replace(/\\r/g, \"\")\n    .replace(/\\u00a0/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]+\\n/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/\\n[ \\t]+/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]{2,}/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/\\n{3,}/g, \"\\n\\n\")\n    .trim();\n}\nfunction htmlDecode(value) {\n  var ta = document.createElement(\"textarea\");\n  ta.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return ta.value;\n}\nfunction stripTags(value) {\n  var div = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  div.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return cleanText(div.textContent || div.innerText || \"\");\n}\nfunction absUrl(url, base) {\n  if (!url) return \"\";\n  try { return new URL(htmlDecode(url), base || currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL).href; }\n  catch (e) {\n    if (String(url).indexOf(\"//\") === 0) return \"https:\" + url;\n    if (String(url).charAt(0) === \"/\") return (base || KETSU_BASE_URL).replace(/\\/$/, \"\") + url;\n    return url;\n  }\n}\nfunction meta(name, doc) {\n  doc = doc || document;\n  var el = doc.querySelector('meta[property=\"' + name + '\"], meta[name=\"' + name + '\"]');\n  return attr(el, \"content\");\n}\nfunction uniquePush(list, seen, key, value) {\n  if (!key || seen[key]) return;\n  seen[key] = true;\n  list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"distro.tv\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"jsrdn.com\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"shout-tv.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"imggaming.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"dicelaboratory.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"xumo.com\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"xumo.\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"iptv-org.github.io\", \"IPTV-org\"],\n    [\"filmzie.com\", \"Filmzie\"],\n    [\"tubitv.com\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"tubi.io\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\nfunction isVerificationPage() {\n  var title = cleanText(document.title || \"\");\n  var body = cleanText(document.body ? (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\") : \"\");\n  return /just a moment|security verification|protect against malicious bots|cloudflare|ray id:/i.test(title + \"\\n\" + body);\n}\nfunction verificationDescription(site) {\n  return site + \" returned a browser/security verification page instead of readable content. Open the source in a browser, clear the check if it appears, then retry the module.\";\n}\nfunction emitVerificationPage(kind, site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var data = [new Data(request(\"\"), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page\", false, request(link), true)];\n  emitPage(kind, data, site);\n}\nfunction emitVerificationInfo(site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var chapter = new Chapter(\"Source blocked by browser verification\", request(link), true);\n  emitInfo(new InfoOutput(request(\"\"), request(link), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), [\"Source verification\"], \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page or retry later\", [chapter]), \"\");\n}\nfunction emitVerificationChapter(site) {\n  emitTextChapter(verificationDescription(site));\n}\n\nvar SHOUT_INIT_URL = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v1/init/?lk=language&pk=subTitleLanguage&pk=subtitlePreferenceMode&pk=subtitlePreferenceMap&pk=audioLanguage&pk=autoAdvance&pk=pluginAccessTokens&pk=videoBackgroundAutoPlay&readLicences=true&countEvents=LIVE&menuTargetPlatform=WEB&readIconStore=ENABLED&readUserProfiles=true\";\nvar SHOUT_HOME_URL = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v4/content/home?bpp=10&rpp=12&displaySectionLinkBuckets=SHOW&displayEpgBuckets=HIDE&displayEmptyBucketShortcuts=SHOW&displayContentAvailableOnSignIn=SHOW&displayGeoblocked=HIDE&bspp=20&premiereEventContentDisplay=SHOW&displayHeroLicences=SHOW\";\nvar SHOUT_LIVE_URL = \"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v2/event/live?p=1&rpp=25\";\nvar SHOUT_API_KEY = \"857a1e5d-e35e-4fdf-805b-a87b6f8364bf\";\nfunction shoutWithParam(url, key, value) {\n  if (!value) return url;\n  return url + (url.indexOf(\"?\") >= 0 ? \"&\" : \"?\") + encodeURIComponent(key) + \"=\" + encodeURIComponent(value);\n}\nfunction shoutHeaders(token) {\n  var list = [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"x-api-key\", SHOUT_API_KEY),\n    new KeyValue(\"Origin\", \"https://watch.shout-tv.com\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://watch.shout-tv.com/\")\n  ];\n  if (token) {\n    list.push(new KeyValue(\"Authorization\", \"Bearer \" + token));\n    list.push(new KeyValue(\"Realm\", \"dce.shout\"));\n  }\n  return list;\n}\nfunction shoutToken(json) {\n  return json && json.authentication ? (json.authentication.authorisationToken || json.authentication.authorizationToken || \"\") : \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutTokenFromState() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var hs = state && state.request && state.request.headers ? state.request.headers : [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < hs.length; i++) {\n    if (/^authorization$/i.test(hs[i].key || \"\")) return String(hs[i].value || \"\").replace(/^Bearer\\s+/i, \"\");\n  }\n  return \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutQuery() {\n  try { return cleanText(new URL(currentUrl()).searchParams.get(\"zetsu_search\") || \"\").toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { return \"\"; }\n}\nfunction shoutManifestBody() {\n  return JSON.stringify({\n    mediaCapabilities: [{ protocols: [\"HLS\", \"DASH\"], audioCodecs: [\"aac\"], videoCodecs: [\"h264\"] }],\n    macros: {\n      \"CM-APP-NAME\": \"Website\",\n      \"CM-APP-VERSION\": \"6.60.0.f412a98\",\n      \"CM-DVC-DNT\": \"0\",\n      \"CM-DVC-H\": \"720\",\n      \"CM-DVC-W\": \"1280\",\n      \"CM-DVC-LANG\": \"en-US\",\n      \"CM-DVC-OS\": \"28\",\n      \"CM-DVC-TYPE\": \"2\",\n      \"CM-WEB-MBL\": \"0\",\n      \"CM-WEB-PAGE\": \"https://watch.shout-tv.com/\"\n    }\n  });\n}\nfunction shoutDetailRequest(event, token) {\n  var id = encodeURIComponent(event.id || \"\");\n  if (event.type === \"LIVE\") {\n    return request(\"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v4/event/\" + id + \"?includePlaybackDetails=URL&displayGeoblocked=HIDE\", \"get\", shoutHeaders(token), null);\n  }\n  return request(\"https://dce-frontoffice.imggaming.com/api/v5/manifest/video/\" + id + \"?includePlaybackDetails=URL&displayGeoblocked=HIDE\", \"post\", shoutHeaders(token), shoutManifestBody());\n}\nfunction shoutInfoInitRequest(event) {\n  var url = shoutWithParam(SHOUT_INIT_URL, \"zetsu_id\", event.id || \"\");\n  url = shoutWithParam(url, \"zetsu_type\", event.type || \"VOD\");\n  return request(url, \"get\", shoutHeaders(\"\"), null);\n}\nfunction shoutEventImage(event) {\n  var info = event.programmingInfo || {};\n  var current = info.currentProgramme || {};\n  return event.posterUrl || event.coverUrl || event.thumbnailUrl || current.thumbnailUrl || info.channelLogoUrl || \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutEventDescription(event) {\n  var info = event.programmingInfo || {};\n  var current = info.currentProgramme || {};\n  if (event.type === \"LIVE\" && current.programme) {\n    var bits = [current.programme, current.episode, current.description].filter(Boolean);\n    return cleanText(bits.join(\" - \"));\n  }\n  return cleanText(event.description || event.longDescription || \"\");\n}\nfunction shoutDuration(seconds) {\n  seconds = parseInt(seconds || 0, 10);\n  if (!seconds) return \"\";\n  var minutes = Math.round(seconds / 60);\n  var h = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\n  var m = minutes % 60;\n  return h ? (h + \"h \" + (m ? m + \"m\" : \"\")) : (m + \"m\");\n}\nfunction shoutPlayable(event) {\n  if (!event || !event.id || !event.title) return false;\n  if (event.accessLevel !== \"GRANTED\") return false;\n  return event.type === \"VOD\" || event.type === \"LIVE\";\n}\nfunction shoutMatches(event, query) {\n  if (!query) return true;\n  var info = event.programmingInfo || {};\n  var current = info.currentProgramme || {};\n  var textBlob = [event.title, event.description, event.longDescription, event.type, current.programme, current.episode, current.description].join(\" \").toLowerCase();\n  return textBlob.indexOf(query) >= 0;\n}\nfunction shoutCollectEvents(json) {\n  var out = [];\n  var seen = {};\n  function add(event) {\n    if (!shoutPlayable(event)) return;\n    var key = event.type + \":\" + event.id;\n    if (seen[key]) return;\n    seen[key] = true;\n    out.push(event);\n  }\n  function walk(node) {\n    if (!node || out.length > 400) return;\n    if (Array.isArray(node)) {\n      for (var i = 0; i < node.length; i++) walk(node[i]);\n      return;\n    }\n    if (typeof node !== \"object\") return;\n    if (node.event) add(node.event);\n    add(node);\n    for (var key in node) if (node.hasOwnProperty(key)) walk(node[key]);\n  }\n  if (json && Array.isArray(json.events)) {\n    for (var e = 0; e < json.events.length; e++) add(json.events[e]);\n  } else {\n    walk(json);\n  }\n  return out;\n}\nfunction shoutData(event) {\n  var title = cleanText(event.title || \"Shout TV\");\n  var desc = shoutEventDescription(event);\n  var typeLabel = event.type === \"LIVE\" ? \"Live\" : shoutDuration(event.duration || 0);\n  return new Data(request(shoutEventImage(event)), title, desc, \"Shout TV\", \"\", \"\", \"\", false, shoutInfoInitRequest(event), false);\n}\nfunction shoutGenres(item) {\n  var genres = [];\n  if (item.type === \"LIVE\") genres.push(\"Live TV\");\n  if (item.type === \"VOD\") genres.push(\"Movie / VOD\");\n  var current = item.programmingInfo && item.programmingInfo.currentProgramme ? item.programmingInfo.currentProgramme : {};\n  if (current.genre) genres.push(current.genre);\n  var cats = item.categories || [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < cats.length && genres.length < 6; i++) if (cats[i]) genres.push(String(cats[i]));\n  var tags = item.displayableTags || item.typedTags || [];\n  for (var t = 0; t < tags.length && genres.length < 6; t++) {\n    var tag = tags[t] && (tags[t].title || tags[t].name || tags[t].value || tags[t]);\n    if (tag) genres.push(String(tag));\n  }\n  return genres.length ? genres : [\"Shout TV\"];\n}\nfunction shoutVodStream(item) {\n  var streams = item.streams || [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < streams.length; i++) {\n    var s = streams[i] || {};\n    if (/HLS/i.test(s.protocol || \"\") && s.url) return s.url;\n  }\n  for (var j = 0; j < streams.length; j++) if (streams[j] && streams[j].url && /\\.m3u8/i.test(streams[j].url)) return streams[j].url;\n  return \"\";\n}\nfunction shoutPlaybackUrl(item) {\n  if (!item) return \"\";\n  return item.hlsUrl || (item.hls && item.hls.url) || shoutVodStream(item) || \"\";\n}\n\nvar json = parseJsonPayload();\nvar query = shoutQuery();\nvar token = shoutTokenFromState();\nvar rows = shoutCollectEvents(json);\nvar data = [];\nvar seen = {};\nfor (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {\n  var event = rows[i];\n  if (!shoutMatches(event, query)) continue;\n  uniquePush(data, seen, event.type + \":\" + event.id, shoutData(event));\n}\nvar state = getSaved();\nvar output = state.output || [];\nif (output.length === 1) {\n  var first = output[0] || {};\n  var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n  if (firstData && !firstData.title && !(firstData.link && firstData.link.url)) output = [];\n}\nif (data.length) output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(\"Shout TV Live Channels\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\nvar next = \"\";\nif (next && query) next = shoutWithParam(next, \"zetsu_search\", query);\nvar ctor = \"main\" === \"search\" ?
